chapter_title: Rules of the Rd. for Drivers
text:
ORS 811.060 (Vehicular assault) shall be known and may be cited as the Milkman Mike Act. [2017 c.388 §3]

Note: 811.059 (Milkman Mike Act) was enacted into law by the Legislative Assembly but was not added to or made a part of ORS chapter 811 or any series therein by legislative action. See Preface to Oregon Revised Statutes for further explanation.
markdown:
## Title 59
### Chapter 811. Rules of the Rd. for Drivers
##### § 811.059 — Milkman Mike Act

ORS 811.060 (Vehicular assault) shall be known and may be cited as the Milkman Mike Act. [2017 c.388 §3]

Note: 811.059 (Milkman Mike Act) was enacted into law by the Legislative Assembly but was not added to or made a part of ORS chapter 811 or any series therein by legislative action. See Preface to Oregon Revised Statutes for further explanation.
